Form 13F SUMMARY PAGE Report Summary: Number of Other Included Managers: 18 ----------- Form 13F Information Table Entry Total: 58 ----------- Form 13F Information Table Value Total: $29,729,870 ----------- (thousands)
Confidential Information has been omitted from the public Form 13F and filed separately with the Commission. Included in this information is information regarding Berkshire's positions in Dun & Bradstreet Corporation, Jones Apparel Group Inc., Mueller Industries and Sealed Air Corporation included in its December 31, 2001 public Form 13F.
